title: callicarpa dolichophylla
intro: Callicarpa dolichophylla, also known as the Purple Callicarpa or Purple Plumera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, and its purple berries are highly valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa dolichophylla include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal medicine, Callicarpa dolichophylla is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to make a decoction, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
